task: Explain Phase 8 execution strategy for three tasks: A and B parallel (different files), C sequential

batch_1.reason: both parallel, no dependencies, no file overlap

execution_phases.phase_3_launch_batch_1: Primary launches Subagent 1 (A) and Subagent 2 (B) in parallel
execution_phases.phase_5_validate_batch_1: Primary validates both A and B, records comments, closes issues
execution_phases.phase_8_validate_batch_2: Primary validates C, records comments, closes issue

critical_rules: Every implementation task is executed by a subagent
Primary agent never writes implementation code
Parallel tasks must have no file overlap
If file overlap detected, convert to sequential
Primary agent must inspect actual file diffs (not just summaries)
Primary agent must run tests to validate (not just trust subagent)
Subagents enforce TDD: RED first, GREEN minimal, REFACTOR polish

partition_logic.rule_3_no_overlap: parallel tasks must not share files
partition_logic.rule_4_sequential: sequential or overlapping tasks run one at a time
partition_logic.rule_5_one_agent_per_task: each agent owns exactly one task issue

after_subagent_returns: Read actual git diff of files
Review file changes against expected scope
Do not rely on subagent summary alone
